title: Diff view component with split/unified mode toggle
purpose: Displays a side-by-side or unified diff of two text strings with mode switching and optional file metadata.
module_context: Exports a React functional component DiffView that accepts props for before/after content, file name, display mode, and styling options. Uses react-diff-viewer-continued for rendering the actual diff.

steps.content: Initialize the component state for the current display mode.
Determine if the dark theme is active based on system preference.
Check if there are any differences between the before and after content.
IF no changes are detected, render a message indicating no changes.
ELSE render the full diff view with header, diff content, and summary.
Provide controls to switch between split and unified display modes.
Pass the diff content to the underlying diff viewer component with appropriate theme and configuration.
